holdings.infoBox: DYTA is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings.

overview.description: The SGI Dynamic Tactical ETF (DYTA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an active fund-of-funds, a non-transparent ETF that seeks capital appreciation by investing in global equity securities while attempting to reduce risk by tactically changing exposure to other asset classes. The fund utilizes the Blue Tractor non-transparent model. DYTA was launched on Mar 30, 2023 and is issued by Summit Global Investments.
